prompt: Summarize the following text in exactly 3 bullet points: Linux is an open-source operating system kernel first released in 1991 by Linus Torvalds. It powers everything from smartphones (Android) to supercomputers, web servers, and embedded devices. The kernel is maintained by thousands of contributors worldwide and is released under the GNU General Public License. Major distributions include Ubuntu, Fedora, Debian, and Arch Linux.
